short_summary: Salud Ortiz Carbajal ( sə-LOOD KAR-bə-hahl; born November 18, 1964) is an American politician serving as the U.S. representative for California's 24th congressional district since 2017. He is a member of the Democratic Party, and his district covers Santa Maria, San Luis Obispo and Santa Barbara.

prior_positions.position: Member of the Santa Barbara County Board of Supervisorsfrom the 1st district
